name: Burning Spear Rub for Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the dried onion, onion powder, thyme, salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, sugar, black pepper, cayenne, chives, finely chopped onion, lime juice, and hot pepper sauce. Blend to a thick paste.
2. If using skinless chicken, add the oil to the paste.
3. Rub the paste over the chicken, cover, and refrigerate overnight.
4. Grill the chicken without removing the spice paste before grilling.
5. Makes enough for 3 1/2 lb. cut-up chicken or 4 large chicken breast halves, skin removed.
